title: 3 Pcs Tea Coffee Sugar Canister, 600ml Square Biscuit Tin, Air tight Jar, Metal Kitchen Tins, Biscuit Storage Box, Stackable Airtight Food Storage Cansiters, with Airtight Wood Lid (Black)
features: 【PACKAGE CONTENTS】 - You will receive a set of 3 square food storage jars, each with a capacity of 600ml. The dimensions are: 8.5 x 8.5 x 8.5 cm (3.3 x 3.3 x 3.3 inches). These jars come with airtight lids featuring strong suction rubber seals, making them ideal for storing sugar, tea, and coffee.

【PREMIUM MATERIAL】 - The square biscuit containers are crafted from high-quality powder-coated metal and complemented by wooden lids. These airtight jars provide a cool, dry, and dark environment to preserve the aroma, flavor, and color of your stored ingredients. Built to last, these storage tins offer long-term reliability.

【Elegant Design】 - The kitchen containers feature a sleek and contemporary design with a clean matte finish that complements any kitchen décor. Their square shape adds an elegant touch to your countertop or pantry. Clearly labeled in a bold and elegant font, they help keep your kitchen organized.

【STACKABLE DIMENSIONS】 - The sugar, tea, and coffee canisters are neither too big nor too small. Designed with stackable dimensions, they efficiently optimize kitchen space. They can be easily stacked atop one another, allowing you to save space in your pantry or on your countertop when not in use.

【WIDE APPLICATION】 - Our food storage containers can be used for storing a wide variety of dry kitchen staples such as coffee, tea, sugar, flour, pasta, nuts, and more. They make perfect gifts for a new home, wedding, Christmas, or as a thoughtful birthday present for family and friends.
description: Specification Material: high-quality powder-coated metal Colour：black Size: 8.5 x 8.5 x 8.5 cm / 3.3 x 3.3 x 3.3 inches (as shown in the picture) Package list: 3 x square food storage jars 3 x wooden airtight lids Notes: 1.Please allow slight dimension difference due to different manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding. 2.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash metal containers with warm water and mild detergent. Wipe wooden lids with a damp cloth and dry immediately. Avoid exposing wooden lids to high heat or direct sunlight. Do not machine wash or put in the dishwasher. Not oven or microwave safe.
specifications_table.Included Components: ‎3 pcs 600ml square metal storage canister with airtight wood lid
